title: ferray-stride-tricks: broadcast functions duplicate ferray-core's broadcast module
description:
Current state: 

Desired state: 

Reason: 

ferray-stride-tricks re-exports broadcast_to, broadcast_arrays, broadcast_shapes, but these functions already exist in ferray_core::dimension::broadcast. Check whether stride-tricks just delegates to core or has its own implementation. If duplicated, consolidate to avoid drift. If stride-tricks adds additional functionality (like accepting ArrayViews), document the distinction.
